atomic_t(3) Library Functions Manual atomic_t(3)

NAME

atomic_t - Atomic value wrapper for integral/boolean types.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/atomic.h>

Public Member Functions


_Atomic (uint64_t) impl
Underlying C11 atomic value.

Data Fields


uint64_t last_store_time_ns
uint64_t last_load_time_ns
uint64_t store_count
uint64_t load_count
uint64_t cas_count
uint64_t cas_success_count
uint64_t fetch_count

Detailed Description

Atomic value wrapper for integral/boolean types.

Wraps C11 _Atomic(uint64_t) with debug tracking fields. All values (bool, int, uint64_t, size_t) fit in uint64_t on 64-bit platforms.

The name is registered separately via NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC macro, stored in named.c registry (not in this struct).

Usage:

// Global declaration
atomic_t g_counter = {0};
// Register name for debug tracking (in main()):
NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC(&g_counter, "g_counter");
// Use:
atomic_store_u64(&g_counter, 0);
uint64_t val = atomic_load_u64(&g_counter);

Definition at line 76 of file atomic.h.

Member Function Documentation

atomic_t::_Atomic (uint64_t )

Underlying C11 atomic value.
